catalog_content:
Item Name: China Mist Green Tea, Sencha with Matcha (15 tea satchets) (6 boxes)
Bullet Point 1: A soothing, mellow green full leaf tea and fine-milled matcha powder, with a light body and rich taste.
Bullet Point 2: Naturally gluten free our China Mist Sencha w/Matcha Green Tea provides a smooth taste with sweet and vegetal notes. Balanced and clear, this lovely green tea has a pleasant, savory taste with complex notes of nuttiness; making this a tea you’ll enjoy re-discovering again and again.
Bullet Point 3: We use only the finest whole leaf tea encased in biodegradable nylon sachet bags, to allow for full expansion of the tea leaves, resulting in a more flavorful cup of hot or cold tea.
Bullet Point 4: China Mist teas are designed to make brewing the perfect iced or hot tea simple and convenient.
Bullet Point 5: Our carefully selected ingredients are certified Kosher and packaged in recyclable boxes, printed with vegetable-based inks – so you can be confident your tea of choice is environmentally sustainable and ethically produced.
Product Description: Indulge in the perfect blend of tradition and modernity with our China Mist Sencha with Matcha Green Tea. This premium tea combines the smooth, mellow flavors of full-leaf Sencha green tea with the rich, umami notes of fine-milled Matcha powder. Each biodegradable nylon sachet allows for full expansion of the tea leaves, ensuring a more flavorful cup, whether you prefer it hot or iced. Enjoy the balanced, savory taste with complex notes of nuttiness, making it a tea you'll look forward to rediscovering. Our carefully selected ingredients are certified Kosher and packaged in recyclable boxes, ensuring an environmentally sustainable and ethically produced product.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium green tea blend combining Sencha and Matcha, positioned as a high-quality, environmentally sustainable product. Biodegradable tea sachets and recyclable packaging with vegetable-based inks emphasize eco-friendliness. Kosher certification and multi-box bundle suggest a mid-to-high price point, targeting conscious consumers seeking premium tea experiences.
